description: Time and Materials IT consulting SOW, $250/hr rate, 500-hour not-to-exceed cap, Illinois governing law
parsed_text:
STATEMENT OF WORK
SOW Reference: SOW #7 — IT Infrastructure Assessment and Remediation

This Statement of Work is issued under the Master Consulting Agreement dated March 1, 2024, between:

Midwest Manufacturing Technologies Corp. ("Client")
2100 Clearwater Drive
Naperville, IL 60563
Contact: Brian Kowalczyk, Director of IT Operations
PO Number: Not Applicable

and

Tech Compass Advisory Services, Inc. ("Vendor")
333 W. Wacker Drive, 15th Floor
Chicago, IL 60606
Contact: Angela Ferreira, Senior Engagement Manager

Project Title: IT Infrastructure Security Assessment and Remediation Planning

1. SCOPE OF SERVICES
Vendor shall provide IT infrastructure assessment, network security evaluation, vulnerability scanning, and remediation planning services for Client's on-premises and hybrid-cloud environment. Services include:
- Current-state architecture review and gap analysis against NIST CSF 2.0 framework
- Network penetration testing (external and internal)
- Active Directory and identity management review
- Prioritized remediation roadmap with estimated implementation effort and cost
- Executive presentation of findings

Services will be provided on a time-and-materials basis, with Vendor personnel providing services at Client's facilities and remotely as mutually agreed.

2. TERM
Commencement Date: April 15, 2025
Estimated Completion Date: August 15, 2025

3. DELIVERABLES

Deliverable A: Current-State Assessment Report
Description: Comprehensive assessment of Client's IT infrastructure, network architecture, and security posture
Estimated Delivery: June 15, 2025

Deliverable B: Vulnerability and Risk Register
Description: Detailed inventory of identified vulnerabilities, risk ratings, and affected systems
Estimated Delivery: July 15, 2025

Deliverable C: Remediation Roadmap and Executive Presentation
Description: Prioritized remediation roadmap with cost/effort estimates and executive-level summary presentation
Estimated Delivery: August 15, 2025

4. PRICING
Pricing Model: Time and Materials (T&M)
Billing Rate: $250.00 per hour for all Vendor personnel regardless of role or seniority
Not-to-Exceed Cap: $125,000.00 USD (500 hours at $250/hr). Vendor shall notify Client in writing when cumulative billings reach 80% of the cap. No work shall be performed beyond the cap without a written Change Order.
Currency: USD

5. PAYMENT TERMS
Vendor shall invoice Client on a bi-weekly basis for actual hours worked and expenses incurred. Payment is due within thirty (30) days of invoice date (Net 30). Invoices shall include a detailed timesheet by consultant name, date, hours, and task description.

6. EXPENSES
Pre-approved travel, lodging, and incidental expenses will be reimbursed at actual cost, not to exceed $5,000.00 without prior Client approval.

7. ACCEPTANCE AND CHANGE ORDERS
Client shall review each written deliverable within ten (10) business days and provide acceptance or written objections. Changes to scope that increase estimated hours shall require a written Change Order executed by both parties prior to performance.

8. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All reports, assessments, and work product delivered under this SOW shall be jointly owned by Client and Vendor. Vendor retains the right to reuse methodologies, frameworks, and non-Client-specific tools developed in connection with services hereunder.

9. GOVERNING LAW
This SOW shall be governed by the laws of the State of Illinois.

Midwest Manufacturing Technologies Corp.        Tech Compass Advisory Services, Inc.
By: /s/ Brian Kowalczyk                         By: /s/ Angela Ferreira
Name: Brian Kowalczyk                           Name: Angela Ferreira
Title: Director of IT Operations                Title: Senior Engagement Manager
Date: April 10, 2025                            Date: April 10, 2025
